svg.title: HDDT FHIR Data Model (Medical Aids and Implants)

g.text: HDDT FHIR Data Model (Medical Aids and Implants)
status : status of the measured value [1..1]
code : classification of the measured value [1..1]

type : kind of device «SCT or ISO/IEEE 11073 code» [1..1]

url : canonical URL for the MIV [1..1]
